action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble val_spearman=0.8833 but predict.py keeps timing out on 50K test sequences with ESM2-t30. Best test=0.7453. Analysis: Need to avoid ESM inference at test time. Use mutation-position features (AA identity at 28 positions = 560 one-hot features). Train model on ESM embeddings + mutation features, but at test time only use mutation features. OR train purely on mutation features. Decision: 1) Train model on mutation-position one-hot features only (no ESM at test time), 2) Also try submitting ensemble with ESM2-t6 for faster inference.
